<!--
Thanks for contributing to Spired! Please fill in the sections below.
Keep the title in Conventional Commits style, e.g. "feat(backend): add review endpoint".
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue this addresses, e.g. "Closes #12". Open changes should start from an issue so the approach is agreed first. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## How it was tested

<!-- How did you check this works? Which tests did you add or run? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The test suite passes (`npm run test:run`)
- [ ] The type check passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Docs or STATUS.md updated if this changes something they describe
